The java files for this game are each in seperate java files (except cereal data which shows clear java text i/o concepts and its complete by itself)
and some parts are not entirely organized so this is just a collection of the java files
because I made them seperately:


import java.io.*;
import java.util.*;

public class RandomText {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		record_random();
	}
	
	public static void record_random() {
		try {
			File file = new File("random.txt");
			if (file.exists()) {
				throw new IOException("File already exists: " + file.getPath());
			}
			PrintWriter output = new PrintWriter(file);
			for (int i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
				output.print((int)(Math.random() * 100) + " ");
			}
			output.close();
			read(file);
		}
		catch(IOException ex) {
			ex.printStackTrace();
		};
	}
	
	public static void read(File f) {
		try(Scanner scan = new Scanner(f)) {
			if (!f.exists()) {
				throw new IOException("File does not exist");
			}
			ArrayList<Integer> data_list = new ArrayList<>();
			while(scan.hasNext()) {
				data_list.add(scan.nextInt());
			}
			scan.close();
			for (int i = 0; i < data_list.size(); i++) {
				if ((i + 1) % 10 != 0) {System.out.print(data_list.get(i) + " ");}
				else {System.out.println(data_list.get(i) + " ");}
			}
		}
		catch (IOException ex) {
			ex.printStackTrace();
		}
	}
}


public class Cereal {

	 private String name;
	 private int calories;
	 private double fiber;
	 private double carbs;
	 private double serving_size;

	 public Cereal(String name, int calories, double fiber, double carbs, double serving_size) {
		 this.name = name;
		 this.calories = calories;
		 this.fiber = fiber;
		 this.carbs = carbs;
		 this.serving_size = serving_size;
	 }

	 public String get_name() {
		 return this.name;
	 }
	 public int get_calories() {
		 return this.calories;
	 }	 
	 public double get_fiber() {
		 return this.fiber;
	 }	 
	 public double get_carbs() {
		 return this.carbs;
	 }	 
	 public double get_serving_size() {
		 return this.serving_size;
	 } 
	 
	 public void set_name(String name) {
		 this.name = name;
	 }
	 public void set_calories(int calories) {
		 this.calories = calories;
	 }	 
	 public void set_fiber(double fiber) {
		 this.fiber = fiber;
	 }	 
	 public void set_carbs(double carbs) {
		 this.carbs = carbs;
	 }	 
	 public void set_serving_size(double serving_size) {
		 this.serving_size = serving_size;
	 }
	 
	 public String toString() {
		 return "Name: " + this.name + " | Calories: " + this.calories + " | Fiber: " + this.fiber + " | Carbs: " + this.carbs + " | Serving Size: " + this.serving_size;
	 }
}


import java.util.*;

public class ExceptionHandling {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		Scanner input = new Scanner(System.in);
		boolean is_correct_input = false;
		while(!is_correct_input) {
			System.out.print("Enter an integer: ");
			try {
				int num = input.nextInt();
				is_correct_input = true;
			}
			catch(Exception ex) {
				System.out.println("Input must be an integer. Try again");
				ex.printStackTrace();
				input.nextLine();
			}
		}
	}
}


import java.io.*;
import java.util.*;

public class RecordScores {

	public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		record();
	}
	
	public static void record() throws IOException {
		File scoreFile = new File("animals.txt");
		if (scoreFile.exists()) {
			throw new IOException("File already exists.");
		}
		
		PrintWriter record = new PrintWriter(scoreFile);
		record.println("rabbit u snake");
		record.println("tiger i umbrella"); 
		record.println("viper a bat");
		record.close();
	}
}


import java.io.*;
import java.util.*;

public class Listing12_3ReadFile {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		System.out.println(read_from_file("read.txt"));
	}

	public static String read_from_file(String path){
		String contents = "";
		
		try(Scanner scan = new Scanner(new File(path))) {
			while(scan.hasNext()) {
				contents += scan.nextLine();
				contents += "\n";
			}
		}
		catch (IOException ex) {
			ex.printStackTrace();
		}
		
		return contents;
	}
}
